creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2012-05-15 10:49:20 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    devel/fuel           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Add new port devel/fuel:
  
  Fuel is a cross-platform GUI front-end to the excellent fossil SCM tool,
  implemented in Qt.
  
  WWW: https://code.google.com/p/fuel-scm/
  
  PR:             ports/167871
  Submitted by:   Hakisho Nukama <nukama at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/devel/fuel/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/fuel/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/fuel/pkg-descr (new)
